parameters.command:
python3 -c "
import subprocess, datetime, json
agents = [
  ('wdc-content-blog', 'Write one new blog post about a high-traffic travel destination. Use local LLM via llm_queue. Save to ~/.openclaw/workspace/content/blogs/[slug]-$(date +%Y%m%d).md. Create a ticket for wdc-website-seo to optimize it.'),
  ('wdc-affiliate-booking', 'Audit all destination pages for missing Booking.com affiliate links. Add AWIN tracking link (mid=18119, id=2803128) to any page lacking one. Create ticket for wdc-marketing-analytics to track click performance.'),
  ('wdc-website-seo', 'Check top 5 blog posts for missing meta descriptions or title tag issues. Fix them. Create ticket for wdc-marketing-analytics to track ranking changes.'),
  ('wdc-marketing-analytics', 'Review last 7 days of traffic patterns. Identify top performing content. Create ticket for wdc-content-blog to write more on winning topics.'),
  ('wdc-research', 'Find 3 trending travel topics this week. Save brief to ~/.openclaw/workspace/companies/WorldDestinationClub/research/trends-$(date +%Y%m%d).md. Create ticket for wdc-content-blog.')
]
for agent_id, prompt in agents:
    print(f'Proactive loop: {agent_id}')
"
